tutorial_button_desc: Learn how to use the Magic Selector with a guided simulation.
usage_assistant_desc: Starts the interactive guide for the application.
ua_step1_text: Access the tools panel and model list from here.
ua_step2_text: Switch active AI or use helper tools.
ua_step3_text: Manually define input boxes and submit buttons on AI websites.
ua_step4_text: Quickly swap positions of the PDF reader and AI panel.
ua_step5_text: Manage app language, appearance, and other advanced options here.
tut_disclaimer: ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
tut_example_site_desc: How can I help you today?
tut_select_btn_desc: The send button is now visible. Hover and CLICK it to teach the AI how to send.
tut_select_input_desc: Hover over the input box below and CLICK to select it. This tells the AI where to type.
tut_success_desc: Excellent! You have successfully mapped the input and send button.
tut_type_msg_desc: Now act like a user. Type "hello" in the box to reveal the send button.
tut_welcome_desc: Learn how to teach the AI to control websites. Click "Start" to begin.
tutorial_center_desc: Browse and start interactive tutorials to learn how to use the application.
tutorial_center_reset_confirm: All tutorial progress will be reset. Are you sure?
tutorial_tab_description: Interactive tutorials and guides to help you get started.
tutorial_general_desc: A quick tour of the main features and layout of the application.
tutorial_general_step_welcome_body: Welcome to Quizlab Reader! This quick tour will show you the main features of the application. You can skip or go back at any time.
tutorial_general_step_hub_body: This is the hub button. Click it to open the tools panel and model list. It's your main navigation point.
tutorial_general_step_tools_body: The tools panel contains quick access to settings, element picker, panel swap, and focus modes.
tutorial_general_step_models_body: Here you can see and switch between your active AI models. Click any model to open it.
tutorial_general_step_panels_body: The app uses a split-screen layout: PDF on the left, AI on the right. You can resize them by dragging the center bar.
tutorial_general_step_resize_body: Drag the center hub left or right to adjust the panel sizes. The hub also acts as the main menu button.
tutorial_general_step_settings_body: Open settings to customize appearance, manage models, configure automation, and more.
tutorial_pdf_desc: Learn how to open, read, and interact with PDF documents.
tutorial_pdf_step_open_body: This is the PDF panel. Drag and drop a PDF file here, or use the file picker to open a document.
tutorial_pdf_step_toolbar_body: The toolbar provides zoom controls, search, page navigation, and access to PDF-specific tools.
tutorial_pdf_step_tabs_body: You can open multiple PDFs at once. Each tab shows a different document. Click a tab to switch between them.
tutorial_pdf_step_viewer_body: The main viewer displays your PDF. You can scroll, zoom, search text, and select content to send to AI.
tutorial_pdf_step_focus_body: Click the focus button to expand the PDF to full screen. Great for reading without distractions.
tutorial_ai_desc: Learn how to use the AI panel, switch models, and send content.
tutorial_ai_step_panel_body: This is the AI panel. It shows web-based AI assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, and more.
tutorial_ai_step_tabs_body: Open multiple AI sessions in tabs. Each tab can use a different model or site.
tutorial_ai_step_webview_body: The webview displays the AI website. Interact with it just like in a regular browser.
tutorial_ai_step_models_body: Use the hub button to see all available models. Click one to open it in a new tab.
tutorial_ai_step_composer_body: When you select text from a PDF or take a screenshot, it appears here. Add notes and send to AI.
tutorial_ai_step_focus_body: Expand the AI panel to full screen for a focused conversation experience.
tutorial_settings_desc: Learn how to navigate and customize the application settings.
tutorial_settings_step_open_body: Click the settings button in the tools panel to open the settings modal.
tutorial_settings_step_sidebar_body: Use the sidebar to navigate between different setting categories. Changes apply instantly.
tutorial_settings_step_appearance_body: Customize the look and feel: change backgrounds, colors, opacity, scale, and more.
tutorial_magic_selector_desc: Learn how to use the interactive element picker to automate web interactions.
